description: Unified compute service contract v1 — 26 operations covering host discovery, catalog, resources, cloud-specific lookups, workload lifecycle, and snapshots. Supersedes virtualmachine-v1 (DD-157). Implementers include Proxmox VE, TrueNAS, Docker Engine, libvirt, and cloud VM providers (Vultr, DO).

operations.description: Platform type, capabilities, OS, GPU hardware, resource totals
operations.name: host_info

operations.description: Multi-node environments (Proxmox cluster, Docker Swarm)
operations.name: host_list

operations.description: Available templates, OS images, container images, app catalog entries
operations.name: catalog_list

operations.description: Search catalog by name, tag, or category
operations.name: catalog_search

operations.description: Template / image detail including config schema
operations.name: catalog_get

operations.description: GPUs: passthrough-capable, allocated, free, driver info
operations.name: gpu_list

operations.description: Storage pools, datastores, volume locations
operations.name: storage_list

operations.description: Bridges, VLANs, overlay networks
operations.name: network_list

operations.description: Datacentre regions with availability (cloud providers only)
operations.name: region_list

operations.description: Instance types with GPU specs and pricing (cloud providers only)
operations.name: plan_list

operations.description: All workloads (VMs, containers, apps) with status summary
operations.name: workload_list

operations.description: Detail of one workload: config, resources, IP, state
operations.name: workload_get

operations.description: Current state: running, stopped, error, creating, migrating
operations.name: workload_status

operations.description: Create workload — payload is platform-appropriate (VM config, compose spec, app schema). Destructive, requires confirmation.
operations.name: workload_create

operations.description: Start a stopped workload
operations.name: workload_start

operations.description: Stop a running workload (preserves state)
operations.name: workload_stop

operations.description: Restart a workload
operations.name: workload_restart

operations.description: Destroy workload and its resources (destructive, requires confirmation)
operations.name: workload_delete

operations.description: Change config, image, resource allocation
operations.name: workload_update

operations.description: Stdout, stderr, console output
operations.name: workload_logs

operations.description: Execute command inside workload (docker exec, VM agent, LXC exec)
operations.name: workload_exec

operations.description: CPU, memory, GPU, network, disk I/O stats
operations.name: workload_metrics

operations.description: List snapshots for a workload
operations.name: snapshot_list

operations.description: Create snapshot
operations.name: snapshot_create

operations.description: Restore from snapshot
operations.name: snapshot_restore

operations.description: Delete snapshot
operations.name: snapshot_delete

title: virtualisation-v1
